entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary crop studied, Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: LY
entities.description: Local groundnut population used for selection

entities.name: VD1
entities.description: Improved groundnut variety released for cultivation

entities.name: LY1
entities.description: Progeny bulk selected from LY that became VD1

entities.name: LY2
entities.description: Progeny bulk selected from LY and evaluated

entities.name: LY3
entities.description: Progeny bulk selected from LY and evaluated

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of pods produced per unit area

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of the pod weight that consists of seeds

entities.name: SEED VIABILITY
entities.description: The percentage of mature seeds that are viable

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of oil present in the seeds

entities.name: ERECT HABIT
entities.description: The growth habit of the plant where it grows upright

entities.name: POD SHAPE
entities.description: The physical characteristics of the pods, specifically 2-seeded and round

entities.name: SEED CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: The physical characteristics of the seeds, specifically tan coloured and round

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach maturity, specifically 90 days

entities.name: PURIFICATION AND SELECTION
entities.description: The process of purifying and selecting improved types from a population

entities.name: SOUTHERN VIETNAM
entities.description: The region where the improved variety was released and cultivated

entities.name: CU CHI
entities.description: A location in Vietnam where seeds were sown and tested

entities.name: TRANG BANG
entities.description: A location in Vietnam where pod samples were collected and tested

entities.name: GO DAU
entities.description: A location in Vietnam where pod samples were collected

entities.name: SONG BE
entities.description: A location in Vietnam where pod samples were collected

entities.name: ACIDIC SOILS
entities.description: The soil condition to which the VD1 variety is well adapted

relationships.description: Method used to improve the groundnut population
VD1 is a variety of groundnut
LY is a local population of groundnut
LY1 was released as the variety VD1
VD1 has a high pod yield of 3.44 t/ha
VD1 has a shelling percentage of 77%
VD1 has a seed viability of 90%
VD1 has a 100-seed weight of 42 g
VD1 has an oil content of 47%
VD1 is characterized by an erect habit
VD1 pods are mostly 2-seeded and round
VD1 seeds are tan coloured and round
VD1 is well adapted to acidic soils
VD1 was released for cultivation in southern Vietnam
VD1 was tested in farmers' fields in Cu Chi
VD1 was tested in farmers' fields in Trang Bang
LY was compared with VD1 for pod yield
